allow: Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from twenty_four.solver import solve_24; print\(''Test 1,2,3,4:'', solve_24\([1,2,3,4]\)[:3]\); print\(''Test 8,3,8,3:'', solve_24\([8,3,8,3]\)[:1]\); print\(''Test 1,1,1,1:'', solve_24\([1,1,1,1]\)\)")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from twenty_four.solver import solve_24; print\(''Test 8,3,8,3:'', solve_24\([8,3,8,3]\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from twenty_four.solver import solve_24; results = solve_24\([1, 3, 6, 10]\); print\(''解法数量:'', len\(results\)\); print\(''\\n''.join\(results\)\)")
